extraction.description: This screenshot shows a ServiceNow Incident manager web app used in the Agentic ILT exercise, displaying incident lists for a specific user tag. The page has a tag input set to "Sergey," a Generate button with the count set to 3, and tables for New tickets and Processed tickets. The highlighted elements indicate the tag filter, the Generate action, the number of tickets to create, and a newly generated incident number in the New tickets table.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the tag input field, enter "Sergey".
2. In the "How many:" field, enter "3".
3. Click on the "Generate" button to create new tickets for processing.
4. Review the "New tickets" table and note the generated incident number, such as "INC0124651".
